name: wool_pattern_motif_reference
description: One extremely simple flat solid-white yarn-ball silhouette: a round ball crossed by exactly three broad curved strand bands and one short tucked tail. It is a shape reference for hand-tuning into a seamless monochrome SVG tile.
prompt_extra: single solid silhouette, one color only, no gradient, outline, texture, shading, shadow, needles, letters or extra objects; centered with generous padding; color will come from CSS

variants.name: tilted
variants.prompt_extra: slightly tilted hand-wound silhouette while remaining simple
